irrigation_systems.name: Drip Irrigation
irrigation_systems.description: Used to conserve water and improve irrigation efficiency, especially in areas with limited water resources.

irrigation_systems.name: Sprinkler Irrigation
irrigation_systems.description: Water is sprayed onto crops using pipes and sprinklers, suitable for large areas.

irrigation_systems.name: Traditional (Surface) Irrigation
irrigation_systems.description: Water flows through channels to agricultural lands, still used in certain regions.

water_sources.description: Surface water comes from rivers and dams.
Groundwater is mainly used in agriculture.
Treated wastewater is used for irrigation on a significant scale.

innovations.name: Hydroponic Farming
innovations.description: Agricultural technique using less water, suitable for small areas.

innovations.name: Using Treated Wastewater
innovations.description: Utilizing treated water from purification plants for agriculture.
